codeReview.summary: The follow-up implementation fixes the prior blocking handoff gap. `requestDiscoverySetup()` now defers all discovery entry points through `pendingDiscoverySetup` whenever onboarding is visible (`app.js:4577`), `runPostAccessBootstrapOnce()` is promise-backed and keeps onboarding-before-discovery ordering one-shot (`app.js:4603`), starter-sheet creation now awaits that bootstrap and routes through the shared deferral helper instead of opening the wizard directly (`app.js:7318-7324`), and onboarding completion resumes the pending setup exactly once (`app.js:13658-13660`). The new regression suite in `tests/discovery-cold-start-handoffs.test.mjs` covers the deep-link deferral, starter-sheet deferral, one-shot resume, and bootstrap sequencing cases that were previously missing.

summary: Pass: the latest follow-up commit resolves the prior blocking issue by deferring non-deep-link cold-start discovery entry points through `pendingDiscoverySetup`, preserving onboarding-first ordering, and resuming discovery exactly once after onboarding completion.
